stemHtml: According to ICAO Doc 8168 PANS-OPS, for aircraft approaching a controlled aerodrome for landing, the QNH altimeter setting shall be made available...

options.a: prior to leaving the en-route cruising level.
options.c: in approach and landing clearances, on request or on a regular basis.
options.d: in approach clearances and in clearances to enter the traffic circuit.
